---
title: "Publications"
---

A full list of my papers is maintained on
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=pbD0dGwAAAAJ).
This page mirrors that list, grouped by year. If you'd prefer the PDF list,
it's on my [CV](cv.qmd).

::: {.callout-note collapse=true}
## About this list

The entries below are auto-generated from my master bibliography file
(`references.bib`). If something looks out of date, please let me know —
the list is rebuilt on every push.
:::

```{=html}
<!-- Publications render from references.bib via nocite: "@*" below. -->
```

## All publications

---

::: {#refs}
:::

---
nocite: |
  @*
---
